blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,459 ft. Looking ahead, 72 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 23" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 19" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
